title: MV3 keepalive (offscreen document + alarms)
description: Implement layered keepalive strategy: (1) offscreen document created on WebSocket connect, destroyed on disconnect, sends chrome.runtime.sendMessage every 25s; (2) chrome.alarms backup at 30s interval; (3) natural WebSocket traffic. Service worker handles keepalive pings as no-ops that reset suspension timer.
acceptanceCriteria: Offscreen document created with reason WORKERS on WebSocket connect
Offscreen document destroyed on WebSocket disconnect
keepalive.html sends chrome.runtime.sendMessage({ type: 'keepalive' }) every 25 seconds
Service worker handles keepalive messages (no-op, receipt resets suspension timer)
chrome.alarms set with periodInMinutes: 0.5 as backup
Alarm handler is a no-op (just resets suspension timer)
No duplicate offscreen documents created on reconnect
